auth.tagline: A calm read on a noisy market.
auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: This is a local demo session — no password, no server. Pick a role to see how the dashboard adapts.
auth.sessionNote: Your session is kept in this browser only (localStorage) and survives a refresh until you sign out.

market.title: Market watch
market.emptySubtitle: Try a different name or symbol.
market.emptyWatchlistSubtitle: Star an asset from the full list to pin it here.
market.stocksKeyMissingTitle: Stocks data needs a free Finnhub key
market.stocksKeyMissingBody: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_FINNHUB_API_KEY to a .env.local file to enable this tab. The Crypto tab works without any setup.
market.adminOnly: Only admins can edit the watchlist

details.title: Asset details
details.selectPrompt: Select an asset from the table to see its details.
